name: Legacy Pro V2 Rubber Parts & Packing Tools 4-Pack
summary: The AirVape Legacy Pro V2 rubber parts and packing tools kit is designed to support maintenance and performance.
description: The AirVape Legacy Pro V2 rubber parts and packing tools kit is designed to support maintenance and performance. It includes essential components to maintain proper sealing and improve chamber loading. Built to original specifications, the rubber parts ensure a secure fit, while the packing tools allow for precise, mess-free loading. Ideal for keeping your device in top condition. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
